ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Total caloric content of the menu item */,
  "calories_from_fat" INTEGER /* Calories contributed from fat */,
  "total_fat" REAL /* Total fat content in grams */,
  "saturated_fat" REAL /* Saturated fat content in grams */,
  "trans_fat" REAL /* Trans fat content in grams */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol content in milligrams */,
  "sodium" INTEGER /* Sodium content in milligrams */,
  "total_carbohydrates" REAL /* Total carbohydrates in grams */,
  "dietary_fiber" REAL /* Dietary fiber in grams */,
  "total_sugars" REAL /* Total sugars in grams */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content in grams */,
  "menu_item_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each menu item */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Standard serving size for the menu item */,
  "serving_size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the serving size */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens present in the menu item */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* Detailed list of ingredients */,
  "preparation_method" TEXT /* Description of how the menu item is prepared */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the nutritional information was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was added to the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the menu item is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is visible to customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_categories" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item sold */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for this sale */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale occurred */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the sale occurred */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the sale occurred */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of any promotion applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item being tracked */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Total calories recorded for the item */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content recorded for the item */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content recorded for the item */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Total carbohydrates recorded for the item */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Dietary fiber recorded for the item */,
  "sugars" REAL /* Total sugars recorded for the item */,
  "sodium" INTEGER /* Sodium content recorded for the item */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol content recorded for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_trends_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., nutritionist, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update log */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the update was made */,
  "previous_values" TEXT /* Previous values of the nutritional information before the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_updates_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
